productDisplayName: JAG Men Chocolate Brown Leather Wallet
description: Style NoteHandcrafted from premium leather, this wallet from jag is specially designed and created with the highest quality standards, ensuring that this piece will last for several years. Its classic styling and minimalistic detailing offers unbeatable understated style, while multiple pockets and slots help keep your monetary essentials organised.nbsp; Product DetailsBrown textured leather wallet with buttoned tab closure Red and green top stitch detail and embossed branding on the frontTwo fold wallet with flap at the left foldTwo main compartmentsThree card slots and a slip pocket on the left foldnbsp; One coin pocket and a slip pocket on the right Three card slots and a photo id card holder on the flapGuarantee: 1yrMaterials and CareLeatherWipe with damp cloth to remove dust SizeDimensions: 11.5 cm x 9 cmWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
